question: European Central Bank raises rates at June meeting?
reason: Market-implied probabilities indicate an 81% chance of a 25 basis point rate hike at the June 11, 2026 ECB meeting.
evidence: As of May 14, 2026, market pricing implies a 81.0% probability of a 25 basis point hike to 2.25% at the June 11, 2026 ECB meeting. ([ecb-watch.eu](https://ecb-watch.eu/?utm_source=openai))

Eurozone inflation reached 3.0% in April 2026, up from 2.6% in March, driven by elevated energy costs. ([myfindex.com](https://www.myfindex.com/finance-trends/ecb-june-rate-decision-eurozone-inflation-2026?utm_source=openai))

ECB President Christine Lagarde acknowledged the need to act to control inflation without derailing economic growth. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/economy/article/2026/05/01/european-central-bank-moves-toward-a-june-interest-rate-hike_6753032_19.html?utm_source=openai))
